data.body: Phase 0-1 done. Epic ba33 (courtly-linear-iguana): 5 code-changing stories. Deps: 46f0 depends_on {4e19,7c84,e7e0}; 4e19/7c84/e7e0/fde0 independent. Stack order (bottom->top): 4e19 -> 7c84 -> e7e0 -> fde0 -> 46f0 (fde0 & 46f0 touch both sidecar files so ordered after 4e19/7c84). Worktree: .claude/worktrees/audit-enrichment on branch epic/audit-enrichment @ origin/main 9edb0cdc3. venv+deps installed, commit-msg+pre-commit hooks active (shared common dir). Gates ON: require_plan_review_for_claim + require_completion_verification_for_close. Landing: stacked relation chain to refs/for/main via gerrit remote.
